title: Lumi's Lots
description: Backports and reworks modern features while adding new features to 1.7.10.
body:
![Mod Icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lumilovesyou/Lumis-Lots/refs/heads/master/src/main/resources/icon.png) # Lumi's Lots *Just things I deemed important enough to add.* Backports and reworks modern features while adding new features to 1.7.10.
## Features ### Backported/Reworked Features
  1. Composting Dirt Crafted from dirt and eight compostable items.
    ID: lumis_lots:composting_dirt
  2. Composted Dirt A result of letting composting dirt sit.
    ID: lumis_lots:composted_dirt
  3. Hoes Breaking Leaves Hoes now break leaves at various speeds depending on material type
  4. Meta Key Copy/Pasting You can now use the left and right meta key (⌘ on macOS) for copy, cutting, selecting all, and pasting
  5. Sponge Functionality Sponges can now be found in the creative inventory and have complete functionality. Obtainable by fishing
### New Features
  1. Inventory Movement Allows the user to move within most GUIs
  2. No Music Cooldown Removes the cooldown between music tracks
  3. Wither Bones Dropped from wither skeletons and can be crafted into wither bonemeal
    ID: lumis_lots:wither_bone
  4. Wither Bonemeal Crafted from wither bones and can be used to de-age plants, clear grass/flowers from an area, or turn plants into bushes
    ID: lumis_lots:wither_bonemeal
  5. Deepslate Cobblestone Generators (EtFuturum necessary) Makes cobblestone/stone generators produce their deepslate equivalent at Y=22 and below
## Gameplay guide ### Compost Composting dirt can be crafted by placing eight compostable items around a block of dirt. Once placed down it will begin to age into composted dirt, a process which can be sped up by placing a water source nearby. Once aged into composted dirt it can be broken to drop 3-5 bonemeal and a block of dirt. If you're using fortune bonemeal drops follow the formula Drop rate = Y * ⌊1.5 * Fortune level⌋, Y ∈ {3, 4, 5}.
![Crafting grid with dirt in centre surrounded by compostable items]( https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lumilovesyou/Lumis-Lots/refs/heads/master/readme/composting_dirt_recipe.png)
Compostable items
  • Apples,
  • Baked Potatoes,
  • Bread,
  • Brown Mushrooms,
  • Cacti,
  • Eggs,
  • Fish,
  • Flowers,
  • Grass,
  • Hay Blocks,
  • Leaves,
  • Lily Pads,
  • Melon Blocks,
  • Melon Seeds,
  • Melon Slices,
  • Nether Wart,
  • Potatoes,
  • Pumpkins,
  • Pumpkin Seeds,
  • Raw Beefs,
  • Raw Chickens,
  • Raw Porkchops,
  • Red Mushrooms,
  • Rotten Flesh,
  • Saplings,
  • Sugar Cane,
  • Vines,
  • Wheat Seeds,
  • Wheat
### Wither Bones & Bonemeal When killed a wither skeleton will drop wither bones following the formula `Drop rate = Y + Looting level, Y ∈ {0, 1, 2, 3}`. These bones can be crafted into wither bonemeal. When used on a crop it will reverse the crop's stage, opposite to bonemeal. When placed upon the ground it will remove nearby grass and flower. Finally, if used upon a plant it will either turn it to a bush or in the case of tall grass turn it to short grass. Another use is it can be a replacement for black dye in recipes. ## How to use Add this mod to your game's `mods` folder along with [Unimixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins/versions) 0.1.23 or greater.
